data_preview.name: XYZ
data_preview.content: https://www.scan.co.uk/ Yep - that’s the *Sennheiser IE 100 PRO In-Ear Monitoring* headphones, in Red. *Current UK prices for the wired version:* - *From £73.00* new — that’s the cheapest across 9 stores right now - *Typical range*: £73 - £100 depending on retailer and colour - *Scan.co.uk*: £79.00 for Black, £82.00 for Clear - *Thomann UK*: £85.00 for Clear - *idealo shows*: New from £73.00, refurbished from £26.38 - *Red version specifically*: Around £100.13 on idealo d8b549da157ec2c6e04e *Note*: There’s also a _Wireless_ version that costs more — from £84.70 to £90.35+. The box in your photo is the wired model. 13cc462b Prices change fast and stock varies by colour, but £73-£85 is the going rate for new wired IE 100 PROs in the UK as of now. Red tends to be slightly pricier than Black/Clear at some retailers. Want me to check a specific store like Amazon UK or Argos for you?
